item.title: 只有0.4升！GMK极摩客 G10 Ryzen5 3500U 迷你主机评测！全功能Type C接口能PD输入DP显示信号输出一线通！
item.itunes:title: 只有0.4升！GMK极摩客 G10 Ryzen5 3500U 迷你主机评测！全功能Type C接口能PD输入DP显示信号输出一线通！
item.itunes:author: jack stone
item.itunes:summary:
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=KULsJ835qxI

值得閱讀的理由

  • 了解一款搭載 AMD CPU 的超小型迷你主機 GMK G10。
  • 比較其性能、散熱、噪音等表現與典型的 Intel 低功耗迷你主機有何不同。
  • 掌握這款主機的介面、網路、儲存等關鍵規格與測試結果，包含獨特的 Type-C 單線連接功能。

摘要

影片的作者為觀眾介紹了一款名為 GMK G10 的超小型迷你主機。與先前評測過的幾款搭載 Intel 低功耗 CPU 的迷你主機不同，G10 採用了 AMD Ryzen 5 3500U CPU，並配備 2.5G 網卡。

這款主機體積僅 0.4 公升，配備 AMD Ryzen 5 3500U 四核心八執行緒處理器、Radeon VEGA 8 內顯、雙 DDR4 記憶體插槽、雙 M.2 PCIe 3.0X4 NVMe 介面。作者展示了主機及所有配件，包含 65W 電源供應器。主機機身小巧，介面豐富，包含前置耳機孔、雙 USB 3.2 Gen1、後置電源 Type-C（僅供電）、全功能 Type-C（支援 PD 輸入和 DP 輸出）、USB 2.0、2.5G 網口、HDMI 2.0 及 DP 介面。主機採用了易於拆卸的設計，方便升級記憶體和 SSD。

作者在 BIOS 中將主機設定為 25 瓦性能模式進行測試。進行 AIDA64 FPU 單烤機穩定性測試，CPU 功率穩定在 25 瓦，整機功耗約 31 瓦，CPU 平均有效頻率約 2.7 GHz。在 25 度室溫下，長時間烤機 CPU 最高溫度 85 度，SSD 最高溫度 44 度，作者認為散熱表現不錯。

基準測試方面，GMK G10 在 CPU-Z、Geekbench 5/6、Cinebench R23/2024、PassMark 等多數測試中，其多核心性能均超越了 Intel N200、N100 和 N150 等低功耗處理器。雖然 Geekbench 6 單核性能略遜於 N200，但整體而言作為超小型主機，其性能釋放優秀。作者也測試了 OpenWRT 下的加解密及 CoreMark 性能，CoreMark 約比 N100 系列高 20%。Radeon VEGA 8 內顯性能也遠優於 N100。

連接性方面，GMK G10 支援三螢幕顯示輸出。HDMI 介面可輸出 4K 60Hz 8 位元訊號，DP 和全功能 Type-C 介面最高支援 4K 95Hz 10 位元訊號。視訊解碼能力良好，可流暢播放本地及 YouTube 的 4K 60 幀 VP9 影片。內建的 PCIe 3.0X4 SSD 速度不錯，測試讀取約 3100 MB/s。WiFi 5 無線網卡性能在其環境下約為 520 Mbps，是 WiFi 5 的不錯表現。2.5G 網卡的內網測試接近 2.35 G。

整機功耗方面，在 25 瓦性能釋放下，整機功耗不超過 45 瓦，待機功耗僅 9.5 瓦，65 瓦電源供應器足夠使用。在 25 度室溫下，CPU 待機溫度 49 度，SSD 42 度。CPU 滿載測試噪音約 49 分貝（耳邊測量約 39 分貝），非常安靜。作者也提供了 10 瓦靜音模式和 15 瓦平衡模式的測試結果。

作者總結，GMK G10 以其小巧的體積，實現了 25 瓦的性能釋放，且散熱和靜音表現優秀。其性能比 Intel N100 等主機高約 20%。具備 2.5G 網口、三顯示輸出和全功能 Type-C 介面（支援 PD+DP 單線連接）是其突出優點。價格（16G+512G 約 1200 人民幣）不算貴，但遺憾沒有準系統配置。缺點是沒有雙 2.5G 網口且 CPU 較舊。總體而言，GMK G10 是一款性能釋放良好、散熱靜音優秀、介面配置不錯、易於拆卸的優秀口袋迷你電腦，作者給予「推薦」的評價。

================================================

# Intro

This is an ultra-small mini mainframe 103 X 98 X 42. with a volume of. only 0.4 liters. It connects to. my monitor with just a Type C cable. At the same time, PD power input and DP display signal output. Hello. everyone. I am Laobai. and today I will introduce to you the GMK G10. an ultra-small mini host with AMDRyzen53500U. We've already introduced you to five ultra-small mini-consoles, all of which have a very small size and an Intel low-power CPU.Today's G10. is different. It. is equipped.

with. AMD Ryzen5 CPU and 2. 5g network card. So at the price of. 1000 yuan,. do you like the low power consumption of Intel N100N150 in the ultra-small mini host? Or do you like AMD Ryzen CPU? GMKG10 small mainframe,. It is equipped with. AMD Ryzen53500U CPU quad-core 8-thread Radeon VEGA8. core display. dual DDR42400 MHz memory dual M. 2PCIe3.0X4 nvme interface. Three-screen display output 2. 5g network card plus WiFi5.

# 配件与接口

Open it and have a look.

The mainframe and all the accessories are here. Power Cable, HDMI Cable,. Monitor Back. Rack. and Screw Instructions. This small power supply is 19 volts 3.42 amperes for a total. of 65 watts.

When we got the small mainframe,. the silver plastic body was. too small. Body interface front panel: headset interface. dual USB3.2 Gen1A port power switch key.

Rear panel: TypeC power interface can only be connected to the full function. of. power supply Type C interface can input. PD and output DP signal at the same time,. USB 2.0 interface, 2.5g network interface,. HDMI 2.0 interface. There are small vents on. the bottom and left side. of the DP connector.

The small host is designed to be easy to disassemble. Gently break off the top cover. to see what interfaces are inside. Dual DDR4 2400 MHz Memory 2280 M. 2 PCIe 3.0X4 nvme SSDs Empty Another set. of same 3.0 X4 nvme interface SSDs. Here is. the installed WiFi 5 wireless card.

# 稳定度与性能测试

In the BIOS. we can see that 16GB DDR4 2400 MHz memory has been installed. Here you can also choose Performance Release. Quiet Mode 10 watts. Balanced Mode 15 watts. Performance Mode 25 watts. We used performance mode for this test. Stability is one of the issues we are most concerned about. We opened the pressure test. of AIDA64 running FPU single baking,. and the CPU was stable at 25 watts in a straight line. The power consumption of the whole machine is about 31 watts,. and the average effective frequency of the CPU is 2.7 G Hertz. we've been baking alone for an hour and 20 minutes. CPU power consumption is maintained at 25 watts,. with a maximum CPU temperature of. 85 degrees and a maximum SSD temperature of 44 degrees. at 25 degrees. This heat dissipation is good. CPUz multi-threaded 1904.3,. single-threaded 413.3,. more than.

all Intel n200 and n100 and n150 Geekbench5 multi-core 3141,. single-core 898. As an ultra-small mini console,. it surpasses. all the n200n100n150 well. Geekbench 6 multi-core 3224. single-core 1122. a little worse than n200. still more than most n100. Cine benchR23, Multicore 3315,. Single Core 926. Exceeds all Intel low power n200. n100 and n150. Cinebench 2024 multi-core 218,. single-core 56,. more than all n200n100n150PassMark multi-threaded 7966,. single-threaded 2204,. close to 8000 points.

It's. a very good result. Based. on the above comparison,. the G10Ryzen53500U multi-core performance surpasses Intel's low-power n200n150. and n100. Considering its ultra-small size. this is still a very good result. Then look at. the entertainment master,. the total score of 4749 73 CPU score is 204818. We also ran. openWRT test on the 3500u. AES400555chacha20291346CoreMark121051CoreMark. is about 20%. higher than. n100 series,. close to.

8259U.

# 图形与游戏性能

The graphics performance of the Radeon VEGA8 is. much better than n100. We also tested the quality of the League of Legends in 1080p,. and the average final team battle. was only 40 frames,. which was average.

# 显示存储网络

The HDMI interface can output. 4K60 Hz 8-bit RGB display signals,. and the DP and TypeC interfaces can output DP signals. Supports up to 4K 95 Hz 10-bit RGB display signal. and connects to. Sony TV. HDMI interface can output 4K60. Hz 8-bit YCbCr444 display signal. Video decoding. which can decode local 4K 60 frames of VP9 video.

Youtube 4K 60 Frame VP 9 The video. plays smoothly.

Original nvmessd test 3100MB/s. is. not bad The speed of. the PCIe3.0X4 SSD WiFi test RealTek 8822CE WiFi5 wireless card. runs at 520 megabits per second. It's average in my wireless network environment, but it's. the best performance. of. WiFi 5. 2.5g network card We used iperf3 to test. the performance of the intranet,. and both single-threaded upload. and download and multi-threaded upload and download are close to 2. 35 G. This Gee-Moke G10 small host is equipped.

# 功耗散热静音

with Ryzen53500UCPU 25-watt performance release,. and we will show you. the list directly. The power consumption of the whole machine does not exceed 45 watts. and the maximum standby power consumption is only 9.5 watts. According to this result. a small power supply of 65 watts can do it. When the room temperature is 25 degrees. the CPU standby temperature is 49 degrees. SSD standby temperature 42 degrees. The noise of the full load of the CPU test is close to 49 decibels. which is withdrawn in the ear 39 decibels is. very quiet. We also. tested the 10-watt silent mode. and the 15-watt balanced mode separately. You can pause to watch. The 25-watt power consumption of.

# 最后总结

the G10 small host is. quite good. considering its size and performance. It is 20%. higher than n100 ultra-small host we. tested before,. and the heat dissipation and silence are also excellent. It. has a compact body,. a 2.5g network port,. three different display output interfaces, and a full-featured Type C interface. Can PD input and DP display signal through a line,. this Tiny small host must support the display. TypeC through a line ah! With 16g memory. 512g SSD configuration as long as 1200 yuan. the price can not be said to be expensive. but unfortunately there is no barebones configuration.

Cons: Not dual 2.5g ports. and this CPU is a little older. To sum up,. the G10. has a factory performance. of. 25 watts,. good release performance, excellent heat dissipation and silence, and excellent interface. At 0.4 liters,. it's a tiny mini-computer. with. a 2.5g network port and a full-featured typec port. It is also easy to dismantle the design. is an excellent pocket mini PC in the palm. we give it a "recommended" evaluation. All right. that's all for today. I'm Laobai. Thank you for watching.

Goodbye.

值得閱讀的理由

  • 了解一款搭載 AMD CPU 的超小型迷你主機 GMK G10。
  • 比較其性能、散熱、噪音等表現與典型的 Intel 低功耗迷你主機有何不同。
  • 掌握這款主機的介面、網路、儲存等關鍵規格與測試結果，包含獨特的 Type-C 單線連接功能。

摘要

影片的作者為觀眾介紹了一款名為 GMK G10 的超小型迷你主機。與先前評測過的幾款搭載 Intel 低功耗 CPU 的迷你主機不同，G10 採用了 AMD Ryzen 5 3500U CPU，並配備 2.5G 網卡。

這款主機體積僅 0.4 公升，配備 AMD Ryzen 5 3500U 四核心八執行緒處理器、Radeon VEGA 8 內顯、雙 DDR4 記憶體插槽、雙 M.2 PCIe 3.0X4 NVMe 介面。作者展示了主機及所有配件，包含 65W 電源供應器。主機機身小巧，介面豐富，包含前置耳機孔、雙 USB 3.2 Gen1、後置電源 Type-C（僅供電）、全功能 Type-C（支援 PD 輸入和 DP 輸出）、USB 2.0、2.5G 網口、HDMI 2.0 及 DP 介面。主機採用了易於拆卸的設計，方便升級記憶體和 SSD。

作者在 BIOS 中將主機設定為 25 瓦性能模式進行測試。進行 AIDA64 FPU 單烤機穩定性測試，CPU 功率穩定在 25 瓦，整機功耗約 31 瓦，CPU 平均有效頻率約 2.7 GHz。在 25 度室溫下，長時間烤機 CPU 最高溫度 85 度，SSD 最高溫度 44 度，作者認為散熱表現不錯。

基準測試方面，GMK G10 在 CPU-Z、Geekbench 5/6、Cinebench R23/2024、PassMark 等多數測試中，其多核心性能均超越了 Intel N200、N100 和 N150 等低功耗處理器。雖然 Geekbench 6 單核性能略遜於 N200，但整體而言作為超小型主機，其性能釋放優秀。作者也測試了 OpenWRT 下的加解密及 CoreMark 性能，CoreMark 約比 N100 系列高 20%。Radeon VEGA 8 內顯性能也遠優於 N100。

連接性方面，GMK G10 支援三螢幕顯示輸出。HDMI 介面可輸出 4K 60Hz 8 位元訊號，DP 和全功能 Type-C 介面最高支援 4K 95Hz 10 位元訊號。視訊解碼能力良好，可流暢播放本地及 YouTube 的 4K 60 幀 VP9 影片。內建的 PCIe 3.0X4 SSD 速度不錯，測試讀取約 3100 MB/s。WiFi 5 無線網卡性能在其環境下約為 520 Mbps，是 WiFi 5 的不錯表現。2.5G 網卡的內網測試接近 2.35 G。

整機功耗方面，在 25 瓦性能釋放下，整機功耗不超過 45 瓦，待機功耗僅 9.5 瓦，65 瓦電源供應器足夠使用。在 25 度室溫下，CPU 待機溫度 49 度，SSD 42 度。CPU 滿載測試噪音約 49 分貝（耳邊測量約 39 分貝），非常安靜。作者也提供了 10 瓦靜音模式和 15 瓦平衡模式的測試結果。

作者總結，GMK G10 以其小巧的體積，實現了 25 瓦的性能釋放，且散熱和靜音表現優秀。其性能比 Intel N100 等主機高約 20%。具備 2.5G 網口、三顯示輸出和全功能 Type-C 介面（支援 PD+DP 單線連接）是其突出優點。價格（16G+512G 約 1200 人民幣）不算貴，但遺憾沒有準系統配置。缺點是沒有雙 2.5G 網口且 CPU 較舊。總體而言，GMK G10 是一款性能釋放良好、散熱靜音優秀、介面配置不錯、易於拆卸的優秀口袋迷你電腦，作者給予「推薦」的評價。

================================================

# Intro

This is an ultra-small mini mainframe 103 X 98 X 42. with a volume of. only 0.4 liters. It connects to. my monitor with just a Type C cable. At the same time, PD power input and DP display signal output. Hello. everyone. I am Laobai. and today I will introduce to you the GMK G10. an ultra-small mini host with AMDRyzen53500U. We've already introduced you to five ultra-small mini-consoles, all of which have a very small size and an Intel low-power CPU.Today's G10. is different. It. is equipped.

with. AMD Ryzen5 CPU and 2. 5g network card. So at the price of. 1000 yuan,. do you like the low power consumption of Intel N100N150 in the ultra-small mini host? Or do you like AMD Ryzen CPU? GMKG10 small mainframe,. It is equipped with. AMD Ryzen53500U CPU quad-core 8-thread Radeon VEGA8. core display. dual DDR42400 MHz memory dual M. 2PCIe3.0X4 nvme interface. Three-screen display output 2. 5g network card plus WiFi5.

# 配件与接口

Open it and have a look.

The mainframe and all the accessories are here. Power Cable, HDMI Cable,. Monitor Back. Rack. and Screw Instructions. This small power supply is 19 volts 3.42 amperes for a total. of 65 watts.

When we got the small mainframe,. the silver plastic body was. too small. Body interface front panel: headset interface. dual USB3.2 Gen1A port power switch key.

Rear panel: TypeC power interface can only be connected to the full function. of. power supply Type C interface can input. PD and output DP signal at the same time,. USB 2.0 interface, 2.5g network interface,. HDMI 2.0 interface. There are small vents on. the bottom and left side. of the DP connector.

The small host is designed to be easy to disassemble. Gently break off the top cover. to see what interfaces are inside. Dual DDR4 2400 MHz Memory 2280 M. 2 PCIe 3.0X4 nvme SSDs Empty Another set. of same 3.0 X4 nvme interface SSDs. Here is. the installed WiFi 5 wireless card.

# 稳定度与性能测试

In the BIOS. we can see that 16GB DDR4 2400 MHz memory has been installed. Here you can also choose Performance Release. Quiet Mode 10 watts. Balanced Mode 15 watts. Performance Mode 25 watts. We used performance mode for this test. Stability is one of the issues we are most concerned about. We opened the pressure test. of AIDA64 running FPU single baking,. and the CPU was stable at 25 watts in a straight line. The power consumption of the whole machine is about 31 watts,. and the average effective frequency of the CPU is 2.7 G Hertz. we've been baking alone for an hour and 20 minutes. CPU power consumption is maintained at 25 watts,. with a maximum CPU temperature of. 85 degrees and a maximum SSD temperature of 44 degrees. at 25 degrees. This heat dissipation is good. CPUz multi-threaded 1904.3,. single-threaded 413.3,. more than.

all Intel n200 and n100 and n150 Geekbench5 multi-core 3141,. single-core 898. As an ultra-small mini console,. it surpasses. all the n200n100n150 well. Geekbench 6 multi-core 3224. single-core 1122. a little worse than n200. still more than most n100. Cine benchR23, Multicore 3315,. Single Core 926. Exceeds all Intel low power n200. n100 and n150. Cinebench 2024 multi-core 218,. single-core 56,. more than all n200n100n150PassMark multi-threaded 7966,. single-threaded 2204,. close to 8000 points.

It's. a very good result. Based. on the above comparison,. the G10Ryzen53500U multi-core performance surpasses Intel's low-power n200n150. and n100. Considering its ultra-small size. this is still a very good result. Then look at. the entertainment master,. the total score of 4749 73 CPU score is 204818. We also ran. openWRT test on the 3500u. AES400555chacha20291346CoreMark121051CoreMark. is about 20%. higher than. n100 series,. close to.

8259U.

# 图形与游戏性能

The graphics performance of the Radeon VEGA8 is. much better than n100. We also tested the quality of the League of Legends in 1080p,. and the average final team battle. was only 40 frames,. which was average.

# 显示存储网络

The HDMI interface can output. 4K60 Hz 8-bit RGB display signals,. and the DP and TypeC interfaces can output DP signals. Supports up to 4K 95 Hz 10-bit RGB display signal. and connects to. Sony TV. HDMI interface can output 4K60. Hz 8-bit YCbCr444 display signal. Video decoding. which can decode local 4K 60 frames of VP9 video.

Youtube 4K 60 Frame VP 9 The video. plays smoothly.

Original nvmessd test 3100MB/s. is. not bad The speed of. the PCIe3.0X4 SSD WiFi test RealTek 8822CE WiFi5 wireless card. runs at 520 megabits per second. It's average in my wireless network environment, but it's. the best performance. of. WiFi 5. 2.5g network card We used iperf3 to test. the performance of the intranet,. and both single-threaded upload. and download and multi-threaded upload and download are close to 2. 35 G. This Gee-Moke G10 small host is equipped.

# 功耗散热静音

with Ryzen53500UCPU 25-watt performance release,. and we will show you. the list directly. The power consumption of the whole machine does not exceed 45 watts. and the maximum standby power consumption is only 9.5 watts. According to this result. a small power supply of 65 watts can do it. When the room temperature is 25 degrees. the CPU standby temperature is 49 degrees. SSD standby temperature 42 degrees. The noise of the full load of the CPU test is close to 49 decibels. which is withdrawn in the ear 39 decibels is. very quiet. We also. tested the 10-watt silent mode. and the 15-watt balanced mode separately. You can pause to watch. The 25-watt power consumption of.

# 最后总结

the G10 small host is. quite good. considering its size and performance. It is 20%. higher than n100 ultra-small host we. tested before,. and the heat dissipation and silence are also excellent. It. has a compact body,. a 2.5g network port,. three different display output interfaces, and a full-featured Type C interface. Can PD input and DP display signal through a line,. this Tiny small host must support the display. TypeC through a line ah! With 16g memory. 512g SSD configuration as long as 1200 yuan. the price can not be said to be expensive. but unfortunately there is no barebones configuration.

Cons: Not dual 2.5g ports. and this CPU is a little older. To sum up,. the G10. has a factory performance. of. 25 watts,. good release performance, excellent heat dissipation and silence, and excellent interface. At 0.4 liters,. it's a tiny mini-computer. with. a 2.5g network port and a full-featured typec port. It is also easy to dismantle the design. is an excellent pocket mini PC in the palm. we give it a "recommended" evaluation. All right. that's all for today. I'm Laobai. Thank you for watching.

Goodbye.

item.content:encoded:
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=KULsJ835qxI

值得閱讀的理由

  • 了解一款搭載 AMD CPU 的超小型迷你主機 GMK G10。
  • 比較其性能、散熱、噪音等表現與典型的 Intel 低功耗迷你主機有何不同。
  • 掌握這款主機的介面、網路、儲存等關鍵規格與測試結果，包含獨特的 Type-C 單線連接功能。

摘要

影片的作者為觀眾介紹了一款名為 GMK G10 的超小型迷你主機。與先前評測過的幾款搭載 Intel 低功耗 CPU 的迷你主機不同，G10 採用了 AMD Ryzen 5 3500U CPU，並配備 2.5G 網卡。

這款主機體積僅 0.4 公升，配備 AMD Ryzen 5 3500U 四核心八執行緒處理器、Radeon VEGA 8 內顯、雙 DDR4 記憶體插槽、雙 M.2 PCIe 3.0X4 NVMe 介面。作者展示了主機及所有配件，包含 65W 電源供應器。主機機身小巧，介面豐富，包含前置耳機孔、雙 USB 3.2 Gen1、後置電源 Type-C（僅供電）、全功能 Type-C（支援 PD 輸入和 DP 輸出）、USB 2.0、2.5G 網口、HDMI 2.0 及 DP 介面。主機採用了易於拆卸的設計，方便升級記憶體和 SSD。

作者在 BIOS 中將主機設定為 25 瓦性能模式進行測試。進行 AIDA64 FPU 單烤機穩定性測試，CPU 功率穩定在 25 瓦，整機功耗約 31 瓦，CPU 平均有效頻率約 2.7 GHz。在 25 度室溫下，長時間烤機 CPU 最高溫度 85 度，SSD 最高溫度 44 度，作者認為散熱表現不錯。

基準測試方面，GMK G10 在 CPU-Z、Geekbench 5/6、Cinebench R23/2024、PassMark 等多數測試中，其多核心性能均超越了 Intel N200、N100 和 N150 等低功耗處理器。雖然 Geekbench 6 單核性能略遜於 N200，但整體而言作為超小型主機，其性能釋放優秀。作者也測試了 OpenWRT 下的加解密及 CoreMark 性能，CoreMark 約比 N100 系列高 20%。Radeon VEGA 8 內顯性能也遠優於 N100。

連接性方面，GMK G10 支援三螢幕顯示輸出。HDMI 介面可輸出 4K 60Hz 8 位元訊號，DP 和全功能 Type-C 介面最高支援 4K 95Hz 10 位元訊號。視訊解碼能力良好，可流暢播放本地及 YouTube 的 4K 60 幀 VP9 影片。內建的 PCIe 3.0X4 SSD 速度不錯，測試讀取約 3100 MB/s。WiFi 5 無線網卡性能在其環境下約為 520 Mbps，是 WiFi 5 的不錯表現。2.5G 網卡的內網測試接近 2.35 G。

整機功耗方面，在 25 瓦性能釋放下，整機功耗不超過 45 瓦，待機功耗僅 9.5 瓦，65 瓦電源供應器足夠使用。在 25 度室溫下，CPU 待機溫度 49 度，SSD 42 度。CPU 滿載測試噪音約 49 分貝（耳邊測量約 39 分貝），非常安靜。作者也提供了 10 瓦靜音模式和 15 瓦平衡模式的測試結果。

作者總結，GMK G10 以其小巧的體積，實現了 25 瓦的性能釋放，且散熱和靜音表現優秀。其性能比 Intel N100 等主機高約 20%。具備 2.5G 網口、三顯示輸出和全功能 Type-C 介面（支援 PD+DP 單線連接）是其突出優點。價格（16G+512G 約 1200 人民幣）不算貴，但遺憾沒有準系統配置。缺點是沒有雙 2.5G 網口且 CPU 較舊。總體而言，GMK G10 是一款性能釋放良好、散熱靜音優秀、介面配置不錯、易於拆卸的優秀口袋迷你電腦，作者給予「推薦」的評價。

================================================

# Intro

This is an ultra-small mini mainframe 103 X 98 X 42. with a volume of. only 0.4 liters. It connects to. my monitor with just a Type C cable. At the same time, PD power input and DP display signal output. Hello. everyone. I am Laobai. and today I will introduce to you the GMK G10. an ultra-small mini host with AMDRyzen53500U. We've already introduced you to five ultra-small mini-consoles, all of which have a very small size and an Intel low-power CPU.Today's G10. is different. It. is equipped.

with. AMD Ryzen5 CPU and 2. 5g network card. So at the price of. 1000 yuan,. do you like the low power consumption of Intel N100N150 in the ultra-small mini host? Or do you like AMD Ryzen CPU? GMKG10 small mainframe,. It is equipped with. AMD Ryzen53500U CPU quad-core 8-thread Radeon VEGA8. core display. dual DDR42400 MHz memory dual M. 2PCIe3.0X4 nvme interface. Three-screen display output 2. 5g network card plus WiFi5.

# 配件与接口

Open it and have a look.

The mainframe and all the accessories are here. Power Cable, HDMI Cable,. Monitor Back. Rack. and Screw Instructions. This small power supply is 19 volts 3.42 amperes for a total. of 65 watts.

When we got the small mainframe,. the silver plastic body was. too small. Body interface front panel: headset interface. dual USB3.2 Gen1A port power switch key.

Rear panel: TypeC power interface can only be connected to the full function. of. power supply Type C interface can input. PD and output DP signal at the same time,. USB 2.0 interface, 2.5g network interface,. HDMI 2.0 interface. There are small vents on. the bottom and left side. of the DP connector.

The small host is designed to be easy to disassemble. Gently break off the top cover. to see what interfaces are inside. Dual DDR4 2400 MHz Memory 2280 M. 2 PCIe 3.0X4 nvme SSDs Empty Another set. of same 3.0 X4 nvme interface SSDs. Here is. the installed WiFi 5 wireless card.

# 稳定度与性能测试

In the BIOS. we can see that 16GB DDR4 2400 MHz memory has been installed. Here you can also choose Performance Release. Quiet Mode 10 watts. Balanced Mode 15 watts. Performance Mode 25 watts. We used performance mode for this test. Stability is one of the issues we are most concerned about. We opened the pressure test. of AIDA64 running FPU single baking,. and the CPU was stable at 25 watts in a straight line. The power consumption of the whole machine is about 31 watts,. and the average effective frequency of the CPU is 2.7 G Hertz. we've been baking alone for an hour and 20 minutes. CPU power consumption is maintained at 25 watts,. with a maximum CPU temperature of. 85 degrees and a maximum SSD temperature of 44 degrees. at 25 degrees. This heat dissipation is good. CPUz multi-threaded 1904.3,. single-threaded 413.3,. more than.

all Intel n200 and n100 and n150 Geekbench5 multi-core 3141,. single-core 898. As an ultra-small mini console,. it surpasses. all the n200n100n150 well. Geekbench 6 multi-core 3224. single-core 1122. a little worse than n200. still more than most n100. Cine benchR23, Multicore 3315,. Single Core 926. Exceeds all Intel low power n200. n100 and n150. Cinebench 2024 multi-core 218,. single-core 56,. more than all n200n100n150PassMark multi-threaded 7966,. single-threaded 2204,. close to 8000 points.

It's. a very good result. Based. on the above comparison,. the G10Ryzen53500U multi-core performance surpasses Intel's low-power n200n150. and n100. Considering its ultra-small size. this is still a very good result. Then look at. the entertainment master,. the total score of 4749 73 CPU score is 204818. We also ran. openWRT test on the 3500u. AES400555chacha20291346CoreMark121051CoreMark. is about 20%. higher than. n100 series,. close to.

8259U.

# 图形与游戏性能

The graphics performance of the Radeon VEGA8 is. much better than n100. We also tested the quality of the League of Legends in 1080p,. and the average final team battle. was only 40 frames,. which was average.

# 显示存储网络

The HDMI interface can output. 4K60 Hz 8-bit RGB display signals,. and the DP and TypeC interfaces can output DP signals. Supports up to 4K 95 Hz 10-bit RGB display signal. and connects to. Sony TV. HDMI interface can output 4K60. Hz 8-bit YCbCr444 display signal. Video decoding. which can decode local 4K 60 frames of VP9 video.

Youtube 4K 60 Frame VP 9 The video. plays smoothly.

Original nvmessd test 3100MB/s. is. not bad The speed of. the PCIe3.0X4 SSD WiFi test RealTek 8822CE WiFi5 wireless card. runs at 520 megabits per second. It's average in my wireless network environment, but it's. the best performance. of. WiFi 5. 2.5g network card We used iperf3 to test. the performance of the intranet,. and both single-threaded upload. and download and multi-threaded upload and download are close to 2. 35 G. This Gee-Moke G10 small host is equipped.

# 功耗散热静音

with Ryzen53500UCPU 25-watt performance release,. and we will show you. the list directly. The power consumption of the whole machine does not exceed 45 watts. and the maximum standby power consumption is only 9.5 watts. According to this result. a small power supply of 65 watts can do it. When the room temperature is 25 degrees. the CPU standby temperature is 49 degrees. SSD standby temperature 42 degrees. The noise of the full load of the CPU test is close to 49 decibels. which is withdrawn in the ear 39 decibels is. very quiet. We also. tested the 10-watt silent mode. and the 15-watt balanced mode separately. You can pause to watch. The 25-watt power consumption of.

# 最后总结

the G10 small host is. quite good. considering its size and performance. It is 20%. higher than n100 ultra-small host we. tested before,. and the heat dissipation and silence are also excellent. It. has a compact body,. a 2.5g network port,. three different display output interfaces, and a full-featured Type C interface. Can PD input and DP display signal through a line,. this Tiny small host must support the display. TypeC through a line ah! With 16g memory. 512g SSD configuration as long as 1200 yuan. the price can not be said to be expensive. but unfortunately there is no barebones configuration.

Cons: Not dual 2.5g ports. and this CPU is a little older. To sum up,. the G10. has a factory performance. of. 25 watts,. good release performance, excellent heat dissipation and silence, and excellent interface. At 0.4 liters,. it's a tiny mini-computer. with. a 2.5g network port and a full-featured typec port. It is also easy to dismantle the design. is an excellent pocket mini PC in the palm. we give it a "recommended" evaluation. All right. that's all for today. I'm Laobai. Thank you for watching.

Goodbye.

item.title: 1U养3代！780M核显最新马甲CPU又来了！磐镭HO5 Ryzen H255 迷你主机全面评测！核显性能在780M核显小主机里排名第一！
item.itunes:title: 1U养3代！780M核显最新马甲CPU又来了！磐镭HO5 Ryzen H255 迷你主机全面评测！核显性能在780M核显小主机里排名第一！
item.itunes:author: jack stone
item.itunes:summary:
值得閱讀的理由

  • 影片評測了搭載全新 AMD Ryzen 7 H255 CPU 的 Panlei HO5 迷你主機，這是作者測試過的第三代 780M 內顯 CPU。
  • 提供了全面的性能評測數據，包括 CPU 基準測試、多款遊戲實測以及內顯性能排名，並與前代及同級競品進行比較。
  • 詳細介紹了該主機旗艦級的介面配置、散熱表現、噪音水平、功耗以及作者對其整體設計與性價比的評價。

摘要

影片開頭與新 CPU 介紹

影片開始，作者回顧了過去兩年測試過的 30 多款搭載 780M 內顯的迷你主機，從第一代的 7840HS/7940HS，到第二代的 8845HS/8745HS。這次，作者帶來了第三代搭載 780M 內顯的 AMD CPU，即 Panlei HO5 迷你主機所使用的 AMD Ryzen 7 H255。作者指出，H255 與 8745HS 在 CPU 規格上幾乎完全相同，同樣具備 4.9 GHz 的加速頻率和 3.8 GHz 的基礎頻率，且都沒有 NPU。

主機設計與介面配置

這款 Panlei HO5 迷你主機繼承了 780M 內顯迷你主機的強力優勢，擁有旗艦級的超級大滿貫介面。機身正面配備了電源開關、雙 USB 3.2 Gen2 Type-A 埠以及一個支援 PD 充電和 DP 顯示輸出的 USB4 介面，還有耳機孔。背面則有 19V 電源接口、雙 2.5G 網路孔、DP 接口、完整的 HDMI 2.1 接口以及雙 USB 2.0 接口。機身側面還板載了 Oculink 介面，底部和側面都有散熱開孔。主機頂蓋採用磁吸式設計，可以輕鬆打開，方便操作。配件包含 HDMI 線、螢幕背掛架等。

內部結構與測試設定

打開磁吸頂蓋，可以看到主機板載了 16GB LPDDR5X 記憶體，速度高達 7500 MHz。內部有一個已佔用的 M.2 PCIe 4.0x4 NVMe 接口（2280 規格），旁邊還有一個相同的空置 NVMe 接口。此外還有 WiFi 7 無線網卡。主機頂蓋上的 LED 燈由主板上的觸點供電。在 BIOS 中，可以設定內顯的專用顯存大小（最高 16GB），也可以手動設定性能釋放。為了充分測試 CPU 的極限性能，作者將功耗牆設定為 85W，溫度牆設定為 95 度。

穩定性測試與 CPU 性能

在進行 AIDA64 FPU 單烤壓力測試時，CPU 功耗初期有所下降，最終穩定在 75W-76W 之間，整機功耗約 74W，CPU 頻率約 3.9 GHz。經過長達 1 小時 8 分鐘的單烤，CPU 功耗穩定維持在 75W，室溫 25 度下，CPU 溫度最高達到 94 度，SSD 溫度最高 49 度，散熱表現穩定。CPU 基準測試方面，H255 的轉碼測試結果為 682 秒，超越了 Ultra 5 125H。在 CPU-Z、Geekbench、Cinebench R23/2024、PassMark 等多執行緒測試中，H255 的性能超越了所有的 Ultra 5 125H，部分成績也超越了 7840HS 的部分分數，整體多執行緒性能雖然略微落後於部分 780M 內顯主機，但已屬優秀水平。

內顯性能與遊戲實測

在內顯性能方面，H255 搭載的 Radeon 780M 表現亮眼。遊戲實測部分，《極限競速 地平線 5》在 1080P 高畫質下可達 70-90+ FPS，《極限競速 地平線 4》在 1080P 極高畫質下可達 80+ FPS。《英雄聯盟》在 4K 中畫質團戰時平均約 100 FPS。《原神》在 1080P 高畫質下穩定 60 FPS。甚至在要求較高的《黑神話：悟空》遊戲內性能測試工具中，於 1080P 自訂畫質開啟 FSR 和幀生成後，平均幀數可達 64 FPS，實際戰鬥體驗流暢。3DMark 測試結果顯示，H255 的內顯圖形性能在作者測試過的 31 款 780M 內顯主機中位居第一，穩定性也高達 98.9%，表明這款主機更適合遊戲。此外，在 Llama 3.1 8B 大模型推理測試中，也達到了 15.26 tok/s 的最佳成績，作者認為這很大程度上歸功於 7500 MHz 的 LPDDR5X 高速記憶體。

連接性與儲存性能

顯示輸出方面，HDMI 接口支援完整的 HDMI 2.1 標準，最高可輸出 4K 144Hz 10-bit RGB 信號。USB4 和 DP 接口也能支援 4K 144Hz 10-bit RGB，超頻後甚至可達 4K 160Hz。連接 Sony OLED 電視時，HDMI 可輸出 4K 120Hz 10-bit YCbCr444 未壓縮信號，顯示性能強勁。原裝 NVMe 硬碟的測試讀寫速度約 5200MB/s，符合 PCIe 4.0x4 入門級水平。搭載 MT7925 WiFi 7 無線網卡，在作者的 WiFi 6 環境下測速達到 840Mbps。螃蟹家的 2.5G 網卡在 iperf3 內網測試中，單執行緒及多執行緒的上傳下載速度均接近 2.35G，能跑滿帶寬，且沒有兼容性問題。

功耗、散熱與噪音

Panlei HO5 在釋放 75W 性能時，整機最大功耗超過 80W，待機功耗約 7.1W，標配的 120W 電源綽綽有餘。室溫 25 度下，CPU 待機溫度 35.6 度，SSD 待機溫度 38 度。在 CPU 滿載釋放 75W 性能時，機身噪音約為 42 分貝，近距離聽約 38 分貝，整體噪音控制得相當安靜。

總結與評價

總結來說，這款 Panlei HO5 搭載 8 核 16 執行緒的 H255 CPU，在 75W 性能釋放下，CPU 多核心性能雖非 780M 系列中最強，但其內建的 780M 內顯圖形性能卻是頂尖水平，輕鬆登頂作者測試過的 31 款 780M 內顯主機榜首。介面配置依然是最完美的旗艦級大滿貫，擁有雙 NVMe、雙 2.5G 網口、三個高刷顯示介面，甚至還有板載 Oculink 可外接獨立顯卡，USB4 支援 PD 供電和 DP 顯示信號一線連接，介面和硬體功能性達到了迷你主機的頂級水平。更重要的是，16G/1T 配置的價格不到 2500 元人民幣，性價比非常高。作者認為其主要缺點是性能釋放需要手動設定，不夠便利，應預設多個檔位供消費者選擇。綜合來看，Panlei HO5 是一款綜合性能不錯的 AMD 銳龍 7 內顯迷你主機，在內顯圖形性能、穩定散熱、靜音效果、超級大滿貫介面以及極具競爭力的價格方面表現尤其突出。憑藉優良的設計、做工、散熱、靜音、介面和性能，作者給予 Panlei HO5「推薦」的評價。

================================================

# Intro

We actually tested. a total of 30 780M nuclear display small hosts,. the earliest of which was. the 7840HS7940HS tested exactly two years ago. Then last year we. welcomed the second generation vest U of 780M nuclear display,. which is 8845HS and 8745HS respectively. To this day. the third generation CPU of AMD 780M core display has also appeared. Hello everyone,. I am Laobai. Today, I will introduce to you the high-performance mini computer Panlei HO5. with AMDRyzen7H255. CPU. Looking directly at the comparison between H255 and 8745HS. the CPU turbo frequency is the same as 4.9 G Hz. the basic frequency is 3.8 G Hz. and there is no NPU with chicken ribs. They are actually exactly the same. This small host also. has a flagship-level Super Grand Slam interface,.

and USB4 can also connect. PD and display signals on a line. It can be said that it inherits the strongest advantage of. 780M core display small host. There are also full-blooded HDMI 2.1 and dual 2.5g network ports,. and the top cover can be. easily opened,. which is easy to use. So in the face of the market. at the same time in. the sale of the 780m core display 123. generation of almost the same performance CPU of the small host,. which generation of production do you prefer to buy?Where's the product? Panlei HO5 device AMDRyzen7H2558. core 16-thread standard pressure mobile CPU,. built-in Radeon 780M core display,. 16Glpddr5x memory,7500 MHz dual M. 2 PCIe 4.0 nvme interface,. three-screen display output,. dual 2.5g network card. plus WiFi 7 side Oculink interface.

# 配件与接口

Open it and have a look. Host and accessories are. here,. HDMI cable,. monitor back rack and screws, SSD cooling pad instructions. This single cell small power supply is 19 volts 6.32 amps for a total. of 120 watts of power. Picking up the small mainframe,. the black plastic fuselage top cover. gives you a prompt to open. the cover and a prompt to switch the led light effect. Front panel. of fuselage interface: power switch key,. dual USB3.2Gen2A ports,. USB4 interface capable of PD display signal. Earphone mouth. Rear panel: 19 V power connector. dual 2.5G network connector. DP connector. full HDM2.1 connector. dual USB 2.0 connector. Side panels: Onboard Oculink Interface. There are vents at the bottom. both sides and the rear. The magnetic top cover is broken off directly,. and it. is easy to take it off. 16g lpddr5x memory is nvmeSSD with PCIe 4.0X4 for 2280 onboard. Next to it is the same empty nvme connector. and the WiFi 7 wireless card,. and here is the contact of. the power supply connector connected to the top cover. It can power the led lights on the top cover.

# 稳定度与性能测试

16g lpddr5 is displayed. on the first page of BIOS Memory. The size of the dedicated video memory for the core display can be set here. Up to 16g,. You can manually set the performance release here. because you want to fully test the maximum limit of this CPU. I set the 85 watt temperature wall. and manually set it to 95 degrees. Remember to manually set it to 85 watts here as well. Stability is one of our biggest concerns. When we opened the stress test of AIDA64 running FPU. the CPU power consumption declined at the beginning. It gradually stabilizes between 75W and 76W. At this time. the power consumption of the whole machine runs at about 74W. and the CPU frequency runs at 3.9G Hertz. is slightly lower,. and the CPU power consumption has been maintained at. 75 watts and 25 degrees at room temperature. for 1 hour and 08 minutes of single baking. The CPU temperature rises up to 94. degrees and the SSD temperature rises up to 49 degrees. Let's first use the Ryzen7H255 of. Panlei HO5 mainframe to transcode and see how. the actual performance is. The final result was 11 minutes and 22 seconds. a total of 682 seconds. 682 seconds, surpassing the Ultra5125H. CPUZ multi-threaded 6701.2 single-threaded 664.2 multi-threaded performance. outperformed. some of.

the 7840HS and all. of the Ultra5125H Geekbench5 multi-core 10707 single-core 1837 more. Nuclear performance is. similar to Ultra5125H. Geekbench 6 Multi-Core 11561. Single Core 2507. Still about the same as the Ultra 5125H. CinebnechR23, a multicore 15952,. Single-core. 1596 multi-core outperforms. some 7840HS. and all Ultra5125HCinebench 2024. multi-core 859 single-core 101 multi-core outperforms allUltra 5125H. PassMark Multithreaded 29018 Single. Threaded 3831 Multithreading Exceeds All Ultra5125H. On the whole,. the multi-threaded performance. of. the current Panlei HO5H255 CPU is. slightly behind. the 780M core display,. but it surpasses the Ultra5125H. Then run entertainment master total score 1379937 CPU score 820659. We also ran. openWRT test on this H255. AES946259chacha20382658CoreMark472046. It's a pity that he didn't. score 500,000 points. in. CoreMark. Then play the game.

# 图形与游戏性能

Horizon 5: 1080p high quality. no anti-aliasing. More than 90 frames for ordinary scenes and more. than 70 frames for complex scenes. That's pretty good.

Horizon 4: 1080p Ultra High Quality with Twice. Anti-Aliasing. More than 80 frames.

League of Legends: 4K Medium Quality. Final Team Battle. About 100 frames on average.

Genshin: 1080p high picture quality,. running and fighting steadily. 60 frames.

Black Myth Goku. uses the in-game performance test tool. 1080P Custom Picture Quality Overshoot. to open. 50 open frame generation. The final result is an average. of 64 frames per second. Actual combat.

This is the game experience that Radeon 780M. brings to us. Let's take a look at the temperature of the game. The CPU is up to 93.8 degrees and the SSD. is up to 65 degrees. Unfortunately, the onboard memory does not have a temperature sensor. Take a look. at. 3DMark's graphics. score TimeSpy3312 FireStrike9426 SteelNomadLight22.81FPS with. 98.9% stability. We made the data of 3DMark into a chart,. and all the results of. H255 ranked first in the 780M core display graphics performance. It shows that our 780m nuclear display console is better. for playing games. Running Llama 3.18 B big model or snake programming runs. to 15.26 tok/s,. which is also. the best result of 780M nuclear display small host. This is probably due in. large part to the fact that the 7500 MHz LPDDR5X memory is. only marginally worse than HX370 with the same memory. onboard.

# 显示存储网络

Display interface output HDMI interface,. supporting up. to 4K 144 Hz 10-bit RGB display signal output,. meeting the full HDMI 2.1standard. USB4 and DP interface output DP signal support. up to 4K144. Hz 10-bit RGB display signal output. Our monitor supports DP interface. After overclocking to 160 Hz,. USB4 and DP interfaces can support. 10-bit RGB display signal output of. 4K 160 Hz. The Sony OLED. TV is connected to. a small host with an HDMI cable,. which can output a 10-bit YCbCr444 non-compressed signal of 4K 120 Hz. Original nvme hard disk test 5200MB/s entry PCIe 4.0X4 storage. read and write capability. The WiFi test MT7925 WiFi7 wireless card. ran at 840 megabits per second,. which. is a good level in my WiFi6 wireless network. environment. Crab 2.5g network card We also used iperf3. to test the performance of the intranet. Both single-threaded uploads and downloads and multi-threaded uploads and downloads. are close to 2. 35 G,. running full bandwidth. This 2.5g network card has no compatibility problems.

# 功耗散热静音

Panlei HO5 is equipped. with a H255 CPU with 8 cores and 16 threads,. which releases 75 watts of performance. Let's show you the list directly. The maximum power consumption of the whole machine is more than 80 watts. and the maximum standby power consumption is 7.1 watts. According to the above results. the 120-watt single-slot small power supply is easy to handle. When the room temperature is 25 degrees. the CPU standby temperature is 35.6 degrees. SSD standby temperature 38 degrees. The 75-watt performance of this small mainframe is released,. the noise of the fuselage is about 42 decibels when. the CPU is fully loaded,. and it is close to 38 decibels when it is withdrawn in the ear. It's pretty quiet.

# 最后总结

Panlei HO5 Mini Computer is equipped with. 75 watts of performance release of. H255 CPU with 8 cores. and 16 threads. CPU multi-core performance is behind. all 780m core display small hosts,. but its built-in core display graphics performance. is the best. Easily topped the list of. all 31 780M nuclear display small hosts. The interface of. this small host is still the most perfect flagship Grand Slam level,. dual nvme dual 2.5g three high brush display interface. There is also. an on-board Oculink interface that can be connected to an external independent graphics card,. and the USB4 interface. can be connected to the PD display signal. Moreover. the price of 16g/1T configuration is less than 2500 yuan. By all accounts,. this is. a very good flagship mini for the money. Disadvantages: I think the manual setting is the biggest,. the performance release is not very good,. it.

should be preset several gears for consumers to. facilitate. To sum up,. under. the 75W performance release,. it is a small host with good comprehensive performance of AMD Ryzen 7 core display. Particularly prominent is that. the nuclear display graphics performance has reached the peak of. 780m nuclear display,. with stable heat dissipation,. excellent silence and super Grand Slam interface. USB4 can be connected to the PD power supply and output DP signals,. and the one-wire interface and hardware functionality. have reached. the top level of the mini host. This is a small host with excellent design. workmanship. heat dissipation. mute interface and performance. and the price is really not expensive after superimposing the national subsidy. We give a "recommended" evaluation. to this Panlei H255 small mainframe. All right, that's all for today. I'm Laobai. Thank you for watching.

Goodbye.

item.description:
值得閱讀的理由

  • 影片評測了搭載全新 AMD Ryzen 7 H255 CPU 的 Panlei HO5 迷你主機，這是作者測試過的第三代 780M 內顯 CPU。
  • 提供了全面的性能評測數據，包括 CPU 基準測試、多款遊戲實測以及內顯性能排名，並與前代及同級競品進行比較。
  • 詳細介紹了該主機旗艦級的介面配置、散熱表現、噪音水平、功耗以及作者對其整體設計與性價比的評價。

摘要

影片開頭與新 CPU 介紹

影片開始，作者回顧了過去兩年測試過的 30 多款搭載 780M 內顯的迷你主機，從第一代的 7840HS/7940HS，到第二代的 8845HS/8745HS。這次，作者帶來了第三代搭載 780M 內顯的 AMD CPU，即 Panlei HO5 迷你主機所使用的 AMD Ryzen 7 H255。作者指出，H255 與 8745HS 在 CPU 規格上幾乎完全相同，同樣具備 4.9 GHz 的加速頻率和 3.8 GHz 的基礎頻率，且都沒有 NPU。

主機設計與介面配置

這款 Panlei HO5 迷你主機繼承了 780M 內顯迷你主機的強力優勢，擁有旗艦級的超級大滿貫介面。機身正面配備了電源開關、雙 USB 3.2 Gen2 Type-A 埠以及一個支援 PD 充電和 DP 顯示輸出的 USB4 介面，還有耳機孔。背面則有 19V 電源接口、雙 2.5G 網路孔、DP 接口、完整的 HDMI 2.1 接口以及雙 USB 2.0 接口。機身側面還板載了 Oculink 介面，底部和側面都有散熱開孔。主機頂蓋採用磁吸式設計，可以輕鬆打開，方便操作。配件包含 HDMI 線、螢幕背掛架等。

內部結構與測試設定

打開磁吸頂蓋，可以看到主機板載了 16GB LPDDR5X 記憶體，速度高達 7500 MHz。內部有一個已佔用的 M.2 PCIe 4.0x4 NVMe 接口（2280 規格），旁邊還有一個相同的空置 NVMe 接口。此外還有 WiFi 7 無線網卡。主機頂蓋上的 LED 燈由主板上的觸點供電。在 BIOS 中，可以設定內顯的專用顯存大小（最高 16GB），也可以手動設定性能釋放。為了充分測試 CPU 的極限性能，作者將功耗牆設定為 85W，溫度牆設定為 95 度。

穩定性測試與 CPU 性能

在進行 AIDA64 FPU 單烤壓力測試時，CPU 功耗初期有所下降，最終穩定在 75W-76W 之間，整機功耗約 74W，CPU 頻率約 3.9 GHz。經過長達 1 小時 8 分鐘的單烤，CPU 功耗穩定維持在 75W，室溫 25 度下，CPU 溫度最高達到 94 度，SSD 溫度最高 49 度，散熱表現穩定。CPU 基準測試方面，H255 的轉碼測試結果為 682 秒，超越了 Ultra 5 125H。在 CPU-Z、Geekbench、Cinebench R23/2024、PassMark 等多執行緒測試中，H255 的性能超越了所有的 Ultra 5 125H，部分成績也超越了 7840HS 的部分分數，整體多執行緒性能雖然略微落後於部分 780M 內顯主機，但已屬優秀水平。

內顯性能與遊戲實測

在內顯性能方面，H255 搭載的 Radeon 780M 表現亮眼。遊戲實測部分，《極限競速 地平線 5》在 1080P 高畫質下可達 70-90+ FPS，《極限競速 地平線 4》在 1080P 極高畫質下可達 80+ FPS。《英雄聯盟》在 4K 中畫質團戰時平均約 100 FPS。《原神》在 1080P 高畫質下穩定 60 FPS。甚至在要求較高的《黑神話：悟空》遊戲內性能測試工具中，於 1080P 自訂畫質開啟 FSR 和幀生成後，平均幀數可達 64 FPS，實際戰鬥體驗流暢。3DMark 測試結果顯示，H255 的內顯圖形性能在作者測試過的 31 款 780M 內顯主機中位居第一，穩定性也高達 98.9%，表明這款主機更適合遊戲。此外，在 Llama 3.1 8B 大模型推理測試中，也達到了 15.26 tok/s 的最佳成績，作者認為這很大程度上歸功於 7500 MHz 的 LPDDR5X 高速記憶體。

連接性與儲存性能

顯示輸出方面，HDMI 接口支援完整的 HDMI 2.1 標準，最高可輸出 4K 144Hz 10-bit RGB 信號。USB4 和 DP 接口也能支援 4K 144Hz 10-bit RGB，超頻後甚至可達 4K 160Hz。連接 Sony OLED 電視時，HDMI 可輸出 4K 120Hz 10-bit YCbCr444 未壓縮信號，顯示性能強勁。原裝 NVMe 硬碟的測試讀寫速度約 5200MB/s，符合 PCIe 4.0x4 入門級水平。搭載 MT7925 WiFi 7 無線網卡，在作者的 WiFi 6 環境下測速達到 840Mbps。螃蟹家的 2.5G 網卡在 iperf3 內網測試中，單執行緒及多執行緒的上傳下載速度均接近 2.35G，能跑滿帶寬，且沒有兼容性問題。

功耗、散熱與噪音

Panlei HO5 在釋放 75W 性能時，整機最大功耗超過 80W，待機功耗約 7.1W，標配的 120W 電源綽綽有餘。室溫 25 度下，CPU 待機溫度 35.6 度，SSD 待機溫度 38 度。在 CPU 滿載釋放 75W 性能時，機身噪音約為 42 分貝，近距離聽約 38 分貝，整體噪音控制得相當安靜。

總結與評價

總結來說，這款 Panlei HO5 搭載 8 核 16 執行緒的 H255 CPU，在 75W 性能釋放下，CPU 多核心性能雖非 780M 系列中最強，但其內建的 780M 內顯圖形性能卻是頂尖水平，輕鬆登頂作者測試過的 31 款 780M 內顯主機榜首。介面配置依然是最完美的旗艦級大滿貫，擁有雙 NVMe、雙 2.5G 網口、三個高刷顯示介面，甚至還有板載 Oculink 可外接獨立顯卡，USB4 支援 PD 供電和 DP 顯示信號一線連接，介面和硬體功能性達到了迷你主機的頂級水平。更重要的是，16G/1T 配置的價格不到 2500 元人民幣，性價比非常高。作者認為其主要缺點是性能釋放需要手動設定，不夠便利，應預設多個檔位供消費者選擇。綜合來看，Panlei HO5 是一款綜合性能不錯的 AMD 銳龍 7 內顯迷你主機，在內顯圖形性能、穩定散熱、靜音效果、超級大滿貫介面以及極具競爭力的價格方面表現尤其突出。憑藉優良的設計、做工、散熱、靜音、介面和性能，作者給予 Panlei HO5「推薦」的評價。

================================================

# Intro

We actually tested. a total of 30 780M nuclear display small hosts,. the earliest of which was. the 7840HS7940HS tested exactly two years ago. Then last year we. welcomed the second generation vest U of 780M nuclear display,. which is 8845HS and 8745HS respectively. To this day. the third generation CPU of AMD 780M core display has also appeared. Hello everyone,. I am Laobai. Today, I will introduce to you the high-performance mini computer Panlei HO5. with AMDRyzen7H255. CPU. Looking directly at the comparison between H255 and 8745HS. the CPU turbo frequency is the same as 4.9 G Hz. the basic frequency is 3.8 G Hz. and there is no NPU with chicken ribs. They are actually exactly the same. This small host also. has a flagship-level Super Grand Slam interface,.

and USB4 can also connect. PD and display signals on a line. It can be said that it inherits the strongest advantage of. 780M core display small host. There are also full-blooded HDMI 2.1 and dual 2.5g network ports,. and the top cover can be. easily opened,. which is easy to use. So in the face of the market. at the same time in. the sale of the 780m core display 123. generation of almost the same performance CPU of the small host,. which generation of production do you prefer to buy?Where's the product? Panlei HO5 device AMDRyzen7H2558. core 16-thread standard pressure mobile CPU,. built-in Radeon 780M core display,. 16Glpddr5x memory,7500 MHz dual M. 2 PCIe 4.0 nvme interface,. three-screen display output,. dual 2.5g network card. plus WiFi 7 side Oculink interface.

# 配件与接口

Open it and have a look. Host and accessories are. here,. HDMI cable,. monitor back rack and screws, SSD cooling pad instructions. This single cell small power supply is 19 volts 6.32 amps for a total. of 120 watts of power. Picking up the small mainframe,. the black plastic fuselage top cover. gives you a prompt to open. the cover and a prompt to switch the led light effect. Front panel. of fuselage interface: power switch key,. dual USB3.2Gen2A ports,. USB4 interface capable of PD display signal. Earphone mouth. Rear panel: 19 V power connector. dual 2.5G network connector. DP connector. full HDM2.1 connector. dual USB 2.0 connector. Side panels: Onboard Oculink Interface. There are vents at the bottom. both sides and the rear. The magnetic top cover is broken off directly,. and it. is easy to take it off. 16g lpddr5x memory is nvmeSSD with PCIe 4.0X4 for 2280 onboard. Next to it is the same empty nvme connector. and the WiFi 7 wireless card,. and here is the contact of. the power supply connector connected to the top cover. It can power the led lights on the top cover.

# 稳定度与性能测试

16g lpddr5 is displayed. on the first page of BIOS Memory. The size of the dedicated video memory for the core display can be set here. Up to 16g,. You can manually set the performance release here. because you want to fully test the maximum limit of this CPU. I set the 85 watt temperature wall. and manually set it to 95 degrees. Remember to manually set it to 85 watts here as well. Stability is one of our biggest concerns. When we opened the stress test of AIDA64 running FPU. the CPU power consumption declined at the beginning. It gradually stabilizes between 75W and 76W. At this time. the power consumption of the whole machine runs at about 74W. and the CPU frequency runs at 3.9G Hertz. is slightly lower,. and the CPU power consumption has been maintained at. 75 watts and 25 degrees at room temperature. for 1 hour and 08 minutes of single baking. The CPU temperature rises up to 94. degrees and the SSD temperature rises up to 49 degrees. Let's first use the Ryzen7H255 of. Panlei HO5 mainframe to transcode and see how. the actual performance is. The final result was 11 minutes and 22 seconds. a total of 682 seconds. 682 seconds, surpassing the Ultra5125H. CPUZ multi-threaded 6701.2 single-threaded 664.2 multi-threaded performance. outperformed. some of.

the 7840HS and all. of the Ultra5125H Geekbench5 multi-core 10707 single-core 1837 more. Nuclear performance is. similar to Ultra5125H. Geekbench 6 Multi-Core 11561. Single Core 2507. Still about the same as the Ultra 5125H. CinebnechR23, a multicore 15952,. Single-core. 1596 multi-core outperforms. some 7840HS. and all Ultra5125HCinebench 2024. multi-core 859 single-core 101 multi-core outperforms allUltra 5125H. PassMark Multithreaded 29018 Single. Threaded 3831 Multithreading Exceeds All Ultra5125H. On the whole,. the multi-threaded performance. of. the current Panlei HO5H255 CPU is. slightly behind. the 780M core display,. but it surpasses the Ultra5125H. Then run entertainment master total score 1379937 CPU score 820659. We also ran. openWRT test on this H255. AES946259chacha20382658CoreMark472046. It's a pity that he didn't. score 500,000 points. in. CoreMark. Then play the game.

# 图形与游戏性能

Horizon 5: 1080p high quality. no anti-aliasing. More than 90 frames for ordinary scenes and more. than 70 frames for complex scenes. That's pretty good.

Horizon 4: 1080p Ultra High Quality with Twice. Anti-Aliasing. More than 80 frames.

League of Legends: 4K Medium Quality. Final Team Battle. About 100 frames on average.

Genshin: 1080p high picture quality,. running and fighting steadily. 60 frames.

Black Myth Goku. uses the in-game performance test tool. 1080P Custom Picture Quality Overshoot. to open. 50 open frame generation. The final result is an average. of 64 frames per second. Actual combat.

This is the game experience that Radeon 780M. brings to us. Let's take a look at the temperature of the game. The CPU is up to 93.8 degrees and the SSD. is up to 65 degrees. Unfortunately, the onboard memory does not have a temperature sensor. Take a look. at. 3DMark's graphics. score TimeSpy3312 FireStrike9426 SteelNomadLight22.81FPS with. 98.9% stability. We made the data of 3DMark into a chart,. and all the results of. H255 ranked first in the 780M core display graphics performance. It shows that our 780m nuclear display console is better. for playing games. Running Llama 3.18 B big model or snake programming runs. to 15.26 tok/s,. which is also. the best result of 780M nuclear display small host. This is probably due in. large part to the fact that the 7500 MHz LPDDR5X memory is. only marginally worse than HX370 with the same memory. onboard.

# 显示存储网络

Display interface output HDMI interface,. supporting up. to 4K 144 Hz 10-bit RGB display signal output,. meeting the full HDMI 2.1standard. USB4 and DP interface output DP signal support. up to 4K144. Hz 10-bit RGB display signal output. Our monitor supports DP interface. After overclocking to 160 Hz,. USB4 and DP interfaces can support. 10-bit RGB display signal output of. 4K 160 Hz. The Sony OLED. TV is connected to. a small host with an HDMI cable,. which can output a 10-bit YCbCr444 non-compressed signal of 4K 120 Hz. Original nvme hard disk test 5200MB/s entry PCIe 4.0X4 storage. read and write capability. The WiFi test MT7925 WiFi7 wireless card. ran at 840 megabits per second,. which. is a good level in my WiFi6 wireless network. environment. Crab 2.5g network card We also used iperf3. to test the performance of the intranet. Both single-threaded uploads and downloads and multi-threaded uploads and downloads. are close to 2. 35 G,. running full bandwidth. This 2.5g network card has no compatibility problems.

# 功耗散热静音

Panlei HO5 is equipped. with a H255 CPU with 8 cores and 16 threads,. which releases 75 watts of performance. Let's show you the list directly. The maximum power consumption of the whole machine is more than 80 watts. and the maximum standby power consumption is 7.1 watts. According to the above results. the 120-watt single-slot small power supply is easy to handle. When the room temperature is 25 degrees. the CPU standby temperature is 35.6 degrees. SSD standby temperature 38 degrees. The 75-watt performance of this small mainframe is released,. the noise of the fuselage is about 42 decibels when. the CPU is fully loaded,. and it is close to 38 decibels when it is withdrawn in the ear. It's pretty quiet.

# 最后总结

Panlei HO5 Mini Computer is equipped with. 75 watts of performance release of. H255 CPU with 8 cores. and 16 threads. CPU multi-core performance is behind. all 780m core display small hosts,. but its built-in core display graphics performance. is the best. Easily topped the list of. all 31 780M nuclear display small hosts. The interface of. this small host is still the most perfect flagship Grand Slam level,. dual nvme dual 2.5g three high brush display interface. There is also. an on-board Oculink interface that can be connected to an external independent graphics card,. and the USB4 interface. can be connected to the PD display signal. Moreover. the price of 16g/1T configuration is less than 2500 yuan. By all accounts,. this is. a very good flagship mini for the money. Disadvantages: I think the manual setting is the biggest,. the performance release is not very good,. it.

should be preset several gears for consumers to. facilitate. To sum up,. under. the 75W performance release,. it is a small host with good comprehensive performance of AMD Ryzen 7 core display. Particularly prominent is that. the nuclear display graphics performance has reached the peak of. 780m nuclear display,. with stable heat dissipation,. excellent silence and super Grand Slam interface. USB4 can be connected to the PD power supply and output DP signals,. and the one-wire interface and hardware functionality. have reached. the top level of the mini host. This is a small host with excellent design. workmanship. heat dissipation. mute interface and performance. and the price is really not expensive after superimposing the national subsidy. We give a "recommended" evaluation. to this Panlei H255 small mainframe. All right, that's all for today. I'm Laobai. Thank you for watching.

Goodbye.

item.content:encoded:
值得閱讀的理由

  • 影片評測了搭載全新 AMD Ryzen 7 H255 CPU 的 Panlei HO5 迷你主機，這是作者測試過的第三代 780M 內顯 CPU。
  • 提供了全面的性能評測數據，包括 CPU 基準測試、多款遊戲實測以及內顯性能排名，並與前代及同級競品進行比較。
  • 詳細介紹了該主機旗艦級的介面配置、散熱表現、噪音水平、功耗以及作者對其整體設計與性價比的評價。

摘要

影片開頭與新 CPU 介紹

影片開始，作者回顧了過去兩年測試過的 30 多款搭載 780M 內顯的迷你主機，從第一代的 7840HS/7940HS，到第二代的 8845HS/8745HS。這次，作者帶來了第三代搭載 780M 內顯的 AMD CPU，即 Panlei HO5 迷你主機所使用的 AMD Ryzen 7 H255。作者指出，H255 與 8745HS 在 CPU 規格上幾乎完全相同，同樣具備 4.9 GHz 的加速頻率和 3.8 GHz 的基礎頻率，且都沒有 NPU。

主機設計與介面配置

這款 Panlei HO5 迷你主機繼承了 780M 內顯迷你主機的強力優勢，擁有旗艦級的超級大滿貫介面。機身正面配備了電源開關、雙 USB 3.2 Gen2 Type-A 埠以及一個支援 PD 充電和 DP 顯示輸出的 USB4 介面，還有耳機孔。背面則有 19V 電源接口、雙 2.5G 網路孔、DP 接口、完整的 HDMI 2.1 接口以及雙 USB 2.0 接口。機身側面還板載了 Oculink 介面，底部和側面都有散熱開孔。主機頂蓋採用磁吸式設計，可以輕鬆打開，方便操作。配件包含 HDMI 線、螢幕背掛架等。

內部結構與測試設定

打開磁吸頂蓋，可以看到主機板載了 16GB LPDDR5X 記憶體，速度高達 7500 MHz。內部有一個已佔用的 M.2 PCIe 4.0x4 NVMe 接口（2280 規格），旁邊還有一個相同的空置 NVMe 接口。此外還有 WiFi 7 無線網卡。主機頂蓋上的 LED 燈由主板上的觸點供電。在 BIOS 中，可以設定內顯的專用顯存大小（最高 16GB），也可以手動設定性能釋放。為了充分測試 CPU 的極限性能，作者將功耗牆設定為 85W，溫度牆設定為 95 度。

穩定性測試與 CPU 性能

在進行 AIDA64 FPU 單烤壓力測試時，CPU 功耗初期有所下降，最終穩定在 75W-76W 之間，整機功耗約 74W，CPU 頻率約 3.9 GHz。經過長達 1 小時 8 分鐘的單烤，CPU 功耗穩定維持在 75W，室溫 25 度下，CPU 溫度最高達到 94 度，SSD 溫度最高 49 度，散熱表現穩定。CPU 基準測試方面，H255 的轉碼測試結果為 682 秒，超越了 Ultra 5 125H。在 CPU-Z、Geekbench、Cinebench R23/2024、PassMark 等多執行緒測試中，H255 的性能超越了所有的 Ultra 5 125H，部分成績也超越了 7840HS 的部分分數，整體多執行緒性能雖然略微落後於部分 780M 內顯主機，但已屬優秀水平。

內顯性能與遊戲實測

在內顯性能方面，H255 搭載的 Radeon 780M 表現亮眼。遊戲實測部分，《極限競速 地平線 5》在 1080P 高畫質下可達 70-90+ FPS，《極限競速 地平線 4》在 1080P 極高畫質下可達 80+ FPS。《英雄聯盟》在 4K 中畫質團戰時平均約 100 FPS。《原神》在 1080P 高畫質下穩定 60 FPS。甚至在要求較高的《黑神話：悟空》遊戲內性能測試工具中，於 1080P 自訂畫質開啟 FSR 和幀生成後，平均幀數可達 64 FPS，實際戰鬥體驗流暢。3DMark 測試結果顯示，H255 的內顯圖形性能在作者測試過的 31 款 780M 內顯主機中位居第一，穩定性也高達 98.9%，表明這款主機更適合遊戲。此外，在 Llama 3.1 8B 大模型推理測試中，也達到了 15.26 tok/s 的最佳成績，作者認為這很大程度上歸功於 7500 MHz 的 LPDDR5X 高速記憶體。

連接性與儲存性能

顯示輸出方面，HDMI 接口支援完整的 HDMI 2.1 標準，最高可輸出 4K 144Hz 10-bit RGB 信號。USB4 和 DP 接口也能支援 4K 144Hz 10-bit RGB，超頻後甚至可達 4K 160Hz。連接 Sony OLED 電視時，HDMI 可輸出 4K 120Hz 10-bit YCbCr444 未壓縮信號，顯示性能強勁。原裝 NVMe 硬碟的測試讀寫速度約 5200MB/s，符合 PCIe 4.0x4 入門級水平。搭載 MT7925 WiFi 7 無線網卡，在作者的 WiFi 6 環境下測速達到 840Mbps。螃蟹家的 2.5G 網卡在 iperf3 內網測試中，單執行緒及多執行緒的上傳下載速度均接近 2.35G，能跑滿帶寬，且沒有兼容性問題。

功耗、散熱與噪音

Panlei HO5 在釋放 75W 性能時，整機最大功耗超過 80W，待機功耗約 7.1W，標配的 120W 電源綽綽有餘。室溫 25 度下，CPU 待機溫度 35.6 度，SSD 待機溫度 38 度。在 CPU 滿載釋放 75W 性能時，機身噪音約為 42 分貝，近距離聽約 38 分貝，整體噪音控制得相當安靜。

總結與評價

總結來說，這款 Panlei HO5 搭載 8 核 16 執行緒的 H255 CPU，在 75W 性能釋放下，CPU 多核心性能雖非 780M 系列中最強，但其內建的 780M 內顯圖形性能卻是頂尖水平，輕鬆登頂作者測試過的 31 款 780M 內顯主機榜首。介面配置依然是最完美的旗艦級大滿貫，擁有雙 NVMe、雙 2.5G 網口、三個高刷顯示介面，甚至還有板載 Oculink 可外接獨立顯卡，USB4 支援 PD 供電和 DP 顯示信號一線連接，介面和硬體功能性達到了迷你主機的頂級水平。更重要的是，16G/1T 配置的價格不到 2500 元人民幣，性價比非常高。作者認為其主要缺點是性能釋放需要手動設定，不夠便利，應預設多個檔位供消費者選擇。綜合來看，Panlei HO5 是一款綜合性能不錯的 AMD 銳龍 7 內顯迷你主機，在內顯圖形性能、穩定散熱、靜音效果、超級大滿貫介面以及極具競爭力的價格方面表現尤其突出。憑藉優良的設計、做工、散熱、靜音、介面和性能，作者給予 Panlei HO5「推薦」的評價。

================================================

# Intro

We actually tested. a total of 30 780M nuclear display small hosts,. the earliest of which was. the 7840HS7940HS tested exactly two years ago. Then last year we. welcomed the second generation vest U of 780M nuclear display,. which is 8845HS and 8745HS respectively. To this day. the third generation CPU of AMD 780M core display has also appeared. Hello everyone,. I am Laobai. Today, I will introduce to you the high-performance mini computer Panlei HO5. with AMDRyzen7H255. CPU. Looking directly at the comparison between H255 and 8745HS. the CPU turbo frequency is the same as 4.9 G Hz. the basic frequency is 3.8 G Hz. and there is no NPU with chicken ribs. They are actually exactly the same. This small host also. has a flagship-level Super Grand Slam interface,.

and USB4 can also connect. PD and display signals on a line. It can be said that it inherits the strongest advantage of. 780M core display small host. There are also full-blooded HDMI 2.1 and dual 2.5g network ports,. and the top cover can be. easily opened,. which is easy to use. So in the face of the market. at the same time in. the sale of the 780m core display 123. generation of almost the same performance CPU of the small host,. which generation of production do you prefer to buy?Where's the product? Panlei HO5 device AMDRyzen7H2558. core 16-thread standard pressure mobile CPU,. built-in Radeon 780M core display,. 16Glpddr5x memory,7500 MHz dual M. 2 PCIe 4.0 nvme interface,. three-screen display output,. dual 2.5g network card. plus WiFi 7 side Oculink interface.

# 配件与接口

Open it and have a look. Host and accessories are. here,. HDMI cable,. monitor back rack and screws, SSD cooling pad instructions. This single cell small power supply is 19 volts 6.32 amps for a total. of 120 watts of power. Picking up the small mainframe,. the black plastic fuselage top cover. gives you a prompt to open. the cover and a prompt to switch the led light effect. Front panel. of fuselage interface: power switch key,. dual USB3.2Gen2A ports,. USB4 interface capable of PD display signal. Earphone mouth. Rear panel: 19 V power connector. dual 2.5G network connector. DP connector. full HDM2.1 connector. dual USB 2.0 connector. Side panels: Onboard Oculink Interface. There are vents at the bottom. both sides and the rear. The magnetic top cover is broken off directly,. and it. is easy to take it off. 16g lpddr5x memory is nvmeSSD with PCIe 4.0X4 for 2280 onboard. Next to it is the same empty nvme connector. and the WiFi 7 wireless card,. and here is the contact of. the power supply connector connected to the top cover. It can power the led lights on the top cover.

# 稳定度与性能测试

16g lpddr5 is displayed. on the first page of BIOS Memory. The size of the dedicated video memory for the core display can be set here. Up to 16g,. You can manually set the performance release here. because you want to fully test the maximum limit of this CPU. I set the 85 watt temperature wall. and manually set it to 95 degrees. Remember to manually set it to 85 watts here as well. Stability is one of our biggest concerns. When we opened the stress test of AIDA64 running FPU. the CPU power consumption declined at the beginning. It gradually stabilizes between 75W and 76W. At this time. the power consumption of the whole machine runs at about 74W. and the CPU frequency runs at 3.9G Hertz. is slightly lower,. and the CPU power consumption has been maintained at. 75 watts and 25 degrees at room temperature. for 1 hour and 08 minutes of single baking. The CPU temperature rises up to 94. degrees and the SSD temperature rises up to 49 degrees. Let's first use the Ryzen7H255 of. Panlei HO5 mainframe to transcode and see how. the actual performance is. The final result was 11 minutes and 22 seconds. a total of 682 seconds. 682 seconds, surpassing the Ultra5125H. CPUZ multi-threaded 6701.2 single-threaded 664.2 multi-threaded performance. outperformed. some of.

the 7840HS and all. of the Ultra5125H Geekbench5 multi-core 10707 single-core 1837 more. Nuclear performance is. similar to Ultra5125H. Geekbench 6 Multi-Core 11561. Single Core 2507. Still about the same as the Ultra 5125H. CinebnechR23, a multicore 15952,. Single-core. 1596 multi-core outperforms. some 7840HS. and all Ultra5125HCinebench 2024. multi-core 859 single-core 101 multi-core outperforms allUltra 5125H. PassMark Multithreaded 29018 Single. Threaded 3831 Multithreading Exceeds All Ultra5125H. On the whole,. the multi-threaded performance. of. the current Panlei HO5H255 CPU is. slightly behind. the 780M core display,. but it surpasses the Ultra5125H. Then run entertainment master total score 1379937 CPU score 820659. We also ran. openWRT test on this H255. AES946259chacha20382658CoreMark472046. It's a pity that he didn't. score 500,000 points. in. CoreMark. Then play the game.

# 图形与游戏性能

Horizon 5: 1080p high quality. no anti-aliasing. More than 90 frames for ordinary scenes and more. than 70 frames for complex scenes. That's pretty good.

Horizon 4: 1080p Ultra High Quality with Twice. Anti-Aliasing. More than 80 frames.

League of Legends: 4K Medium Quality. Final Team Battle. About 100 frames on average.

Genshin: 1080p high picture quality,. running and fighting steadily. 60 frames.

Black Myth Goku. uses the in-game performance test tool. 1080P Custom Picture Quality Overshoot. to open. 50 open frame generation. The final result is an average. of 64 frames per second. Actual combat.

This is the game experience that Radeon 780M. brings to us. Let's take a look at the temperature of the game. The CPU is up to 93.8 degrees and the SSD. is up to 65 degrees. Unfortunately, the onboard memory does not have a temperature sensor. Take a look. at. 3DMark's graphics. score TimeSpy3312 FireStrike9426 SteelNomadLight22.81FPS with. 98.9% stability. We made the data of 3DMark into a chart,. and all the results of. H255 ranked first in the 780M core display graphics performance. It shows that our 780m nuclear display console is better. for playing games. Running Llama 3.18 B big model or snake programming runs. to 15.26 tok/s,. which is also. the best result of 780M nuclear display small host. This is probably due in. large part to the fact that the 7500 MHz LPDDR5X memory is. only marginally worse than HX370 with the same memory. onboard.

# 显示存储网络

Display interface output HDMI interface,. supporting up. to 4K 144 Hz 10-bit RGB display signal output,. meeting the full HDMI 2.1standard. USB4 and DP interface output DP signal support. up to 4K144. Hz 10-bit RGB display signal output. Our monitor supports DP interface. After overclocking to 160 Hz,. USB4 and DP interfaces can support. 10-bit RGB display signal output of. 4K 160 Hz. The Sony OLED. TV is connected to. a small host with an HDMI cable,. which can output a 10-bit YCbCr444 non-compressed signal of 4K 120 Hz. Original nvme hard disk test 5200MB/s entry PCIe 4.0X4 storage. read and write capability. The WiFi test MT7925 WiFi7 wireless card. ran at 840 megabits per second,. which. is a good level in my WiFi6 wireless network. environment. Crab 2.5g network card We also used iperf3. to test the performance of the intranet. Both single-threaded uploads and downloads and multi-threaded uploads and downloads. are close to 2. 35 G,. running full bandwidth. This 2.5g network card has no compatibility problems.

# 功耗散热静音

Panlei HO5 is equipped. with a H255 CPU with 8 cores and 16 threads,. which releases 75 watts of performance. Let's show you the list directly. The maximum power consumption of the whole machine is more than 80 watts. and the maximum standby power consumption is 7.1 watts. According to the above results. the 120-watt single-slot small power supply is easy to handle. When the room temperature is 25 degrees. the CPU standby temperature is 35.6 degrees. SSD standby temperature 38 degrees. The 75-watt performance of this small mainframe is released,. the noise of the fuselage is about 42 decibels when. the CPU is fully loaded,. and it is close to 38 decibels when it is withdrawn in the ear. It's pretty quiet.

# 最后总结

Panlei HO5 Mini Computer is equipped with. 75 watts of performance release of. H255 CPU with 8 cores. and 16 threads. CPU multi-core performance is behind. all 780m core display small hosts,. but its built-in core display graphics performance. is the best. Easily topped the list of. all 31 780M nuclear display small hosts. The interface of. this small host is still the most perfect flagship Grand Slam level,. dual nvme dual 2.5g three high brush display interface. There is also. an on-board Oculink interface that can be connected to an external independent graphics card,. and the USB4 interface. can be connected to the PD display signal. Moreover. the price of 16g/1T configuration is less than 2500 yuan. By all accounts,. this is. a very good flagship mini for the money. Disadvantages: I think the manual setting is the biggest,. the performance release is not very good,. it.

should be preset several gears for consumers to. facilitate. To sum up,. under. the 75W performance release,. it is a small host with good comprehensive performance of AMD Ryzen 7 core display. Particularly prominent is that. the nuclear display graphics performance has reached the peak of. 780m nuclear display,. with stable heat dissipation,. excellent silence and super Grand Slam interface. USB4 can be connected to the PD power supply and output DP signals,. and the one-wire interface and hardware functionality. have reached. the top level of the mini host. This is a small host with excellent design. workmanship. heat dissipation. mute interface and performance. and the price is really not expensive after superimposing the national subsidy. We give a "recommended" evaluation. to this Panlei H255 small mainframe. All right, that's all for today. I'm Laobai. Thank you for watching.

Goodbye.

item.title: 我们测试近40款新机，精选12款为您呈现618推荐！2025年618迷你电脑选购指南：云卷云舒进化之道！#minipc #4k
item.itunes:title: 我们测试近40款新机，精选12款为您呈现618推荐！2025年618迷你电脑选购指南：云卷云舒进化之道！#minipc #4k
item.itunes:author: jack stone
item.itunes:summary:
值得閱讀的理由

  • 本摘要涵蓋了2024年618期間，作者針對不同預算範圍（千元以下、1000-2000元、2000-3000元、3000元以上）測試並推薦的多款迷你主機。
  • 內容基於作者對近40款不同品牌迷你主機進行詳細測試後的經驗總結，提供了各價位段的性價比或性能首選。
  • 摘要不僅列出了推薦型號和大致價格，還強調了各款主機的關鍵特色，如處理器、核顯性能、接口配置（包含Oculink、USB4、2.5G網卡等）、散熱表現及功耗釋放，有助於讀者快速篩選符合需求的迷你主機。

摘要

影片開頭與分類介紹

作者首先向觀眾介紹，618年中購物節即將到來，他們將根據過去一年多測試近40款迷你主機的經驗，為大家推薦各價位段最值得購買的迷你主機。作者將市面上的迷你主機簡單粗暴地分為四類：千元以下的Intel低功耗N系列、1000元到2000元之間的中端高能效迷你主機（主要推薦AMD Ryzen）、2000元到3000元之間的旗艦級迷你主機（主要推薦AMD Ryzen），以及3000元以上的搭載獨立顯卡的迷你主機。

千元以下低功耗迷你主機推薦

針對預算在千元以下的用戶，作者主要推薦了基於Intel低功耗N系列處理器的迷你主機。作者展示了一份包含36款N系列低功耗主機的基本數據表格，方便觀眾參考。作者從中精選了四款進行推薦。

首先是售價569元的GMK Geo Moke G3 Plus，搭載Intel四核N150 CPU。這款準系統主機不僅價格便宜，用戶可自行加裝DDR4或更便宜的DDR5內存，其性能釋放接近15W，散熱和靜音表現優異。儘管是超迷你體積，但其對有線網絡接口的要求不應降低。

其次是售價859元的Sky Barium N1 Pro，搭載N150 CPU，內建12GB LPDDR5X 4800MHz內存，具備全功能Type C接口支援一線通。在如此小的體積下，還提供了雙2.5G網卡，散熱靜音表現出色，是目前最好的超迷你主機，雖然價格稍貴。

第三款是售價753元的零刻EQ14，搭載N150 CPU，是EQ13 N100的升級版，內建電源系統。

最後是售價995元的M9S N305，這是目前N305處理器中最便宜的型號，也是目前最強的N系列低功耗主機，CoreMark得分高達2000萬。

1000元到2000元中端高能效迷你主機推薦

在這個價位段，作者主要推薦了兩款表現突出的AMD Ryzen迷你主機。

第一款是近期測試的攀睿WO7，售價1159元。作者稱其為近兩年來最好的HTPC選擇。它不僅擁有千元級最強的680M核顯，還具備滿血的HDMI 2.1接口，可連接高刷新率電視。其性能接近標壓的7735HS，功耗釋放稍高於同類產品，全功能Type C接口支援PD顯示一線通。散熱、靜音、穩定性俱佳，價格非常接近千元，是此價位段的首選。

第二款是售價1699元的傑末克K6，搭載了7840HS處理器。作者認為這款主機以極低的價格實現了降維打擊。在這個價位，其他廠商多銷售6800H或6900HX的主機，而K6直接提供了7840HS。它具備雙2.5G網卡，最高性能可達62W，相比其他8845HS表現不俗。作者認為唯一的缺點是未原生提供Oculink接口，無法實現接口大滿貫，但價格便宜，需要Oculink的遊戲玩家可花幾十元更換底座實現。

2000元到3000元旗艦級迷你主機推薦

作者測試了30多款780M/880M核顯迷你主機，此價位段的旗艦主機必須具備Oculink接口。作者首先推薦了幾個系列產品。

首先是天寶GEM12系列，外觀和接口基本一致，銷售GEM12 Plus和Max型號。其8845HS準系統僅售2069元，8745HS更低。具備接口大滿貫配置：雙2.5G、雙USB4、雙NVMe、Oculink接口。性能表現優秀，65W功耗釋放可達17000分。散熱、靜音出色，接口齊全，價格非常低。

接下來推薦的是傑末克K11和K8 Plus，接口配置和外觀相似，是傑末克迭代後的新產品，遠優於入門級K6。K8 Plus準系統售價2199元，K11使用更貴的8945HS CPU。兩者都具備接口大滿貫。性能方面，K11 8945HS遙遙領先，65W性能釋放良好，散熱穩定靜音，接口完美。

炫派魔方系列在一個外形接口上迭代了三款CPU。其7840HS準系統國補最低2000元，8745HS稍貴。同樣接口完美，性能釋放可達80W，處於作者測試過的780M核顯主機前列，雙USB4可實現PD輸入，是一款非常強悍的迷你主機。

最後推薦的旗艦主機系列是Minis Forum UM880系列。這款售價2200元的幾乎完美的迷你主機，是接口超級大滿貫的桶機。其性能長期位居作者性能排行榜前列，70W功耗釋放，接口完美，價格也不算貴。

以上四個不同廠家的780M系列迷你主機，準系統價格都在2000元出頭，是作者推薦的高品質旗艦級迷你主機系列。

此外，作者還額外推薦兩款單獨的780M核顯迷你主機。第一款是極夜T8，搭載8745HSCPU，價格約1900元。特色是採用了桌上型推下式散熱系統，性能釋放直接拉滿到85W，位居前列。同樣是超級大滿貫接口，適合需要強勁散熱的用戶考慮。另一款是作者之前一直推薦、幾乎沒有短板的FEVM FA880，升級雙2.5G網口後更名為FA880 Pro。價格稍貴，但性能絕對在所有780M核顯主機前列，70W功耗釋放，接口完美，待機功耗極低。

3000元以上獨立顯卡迷你主機推薦

針對預算在3000元以上、不設上限的單顯示輸出迷你主機，作者進行了推薦。最貴的測試型號是售價24999元的ROG NUC 2025，性能非常強勁（5080M顯卡），但價格很高。

作者最後推薦了Sky Barium GOD系列。這個系列售價在3000元以上，搭載AMD 6600le獨立顯卡。顯卡性能比80W的4060略高，約為RTX 4060的80%。性能釋放和接口都非常令人滿意，最重要的是價格僅在3000元出頭。其顯卡性能是HX370的兩倍。

全場景最值得購買的迷你主機：Mac Mini

作者認為，全場景下最值得購買的迷你主機是M4 Mac mini。國補後10G網口乞丐版僅需2899元。作者自己的購入價為5299元，直言有背刺感。M4 Mac mini具備無可匹敵的單核性能，多核性能接近HX370，圖形性能至少不差於HX370。這是一款風扇幾乎聽不到聲音、接近靜音的完美迷你主機，也是至今最便宜、最好的Mac mini。作者建議對電子產品好奇的朋友購買，它能打開新世界的大門。

結語

作者表示以上的推薦是基於目前的測試結果，並補充了一些關於下一代AMD旗艦CPU的額外說明。

item.description:
值得閱讀的理由

  • 本摘要涵蓋了2024年618期間，作者針對不同預算範圍（千元以下、1000-2000元、2000-3000元、3000元以上）測試並推薦的多款迷你主機。
  • 內容基於作者對近40款不同品牌迷你主機進行詳細測試後的經驗總結，提供了各價位段的性價比或性能首選。
  • 摘要不僅列出了推薦型號和大致價格，還強調了各款主機的關鍵特色，如處理器、核顯性能、接口配置（包含Oculink、USB4、2.5G網卡等）、散熱表現及功耗釋放，有助於讀者快速篩選符合需求的迷你主機。

摘要

影片開頭與分類介紹

作者首先向觀眾介紹，618年中購物節即將到來，他們將根據過去一年多測試近40款迷你主機的經驗，為大家推薦各價位段最值得購買的迷你主機。作者將市面上的迷你主機簡單粗暴地分為四類：千元以下的Intel低功耗N系列、1000元到2000元之間的中端高能效迷你主機（主要推薦AMD Ryzen）、2000元到3000元之間的旗艦級迷你主機（主要推薦AMD Ryzen），以及3000元以上的搭載獨立顯卡的迷你主機。

千元以下低功耗迷你主機推薦

針對預算在千元以下的用戶，作者主要推薦了基於Intel低功耗N系列處理器的迷你主機。作者展示了一份包含36款N系列低功耗主機的基本數據表格，方便觀眾參考。作者從中精選了四款進行推薦。

首先是售價569元的GMK Geo Moke G3 Plus，搭載Intel四核N150 CPU。這款準系統主機不僅價格便宜，用戶可自行加裝DDR4或更便宜的DDR5內存，其性能釋放接近15W，散熱和靜音表現優異。儘管是超迷你體積，但其對有線網絡接口的要求不應降低。

其次是售價859元的Sky Barium N1 Pro，搭載N150 CPU，內建12GB LPDDR5X 4800MHz內存，具備全功能Type C接口支援一線通。在如此小的體積下，還提供了雙2.5G網卡，散熱靜音表現出色，是目前最好的超迷你主機，雖然價格稍貴。

第三款是售價753元的零刻EQ14，搭載N150 CPU，是EQ13 N100的升級版，內建電源系統。

最後是售價995元的M9S N305，這是目前N305處理器中最便宜的型號，也是目前最強的N系列低功耗主機，CoreMark得分高達2000萬。

1000元到2000元中端高能效迷你主機推薦

在這個價位段，作者主要推薦了兩款表現突出的AMD Ryzen迷你主機。

第一款是近期測試的攀睿WO7，售價1159元。作者稱其為近兩年來最好的HTPC選擇。它不僅擁有千元級最強的680M核顯，還具備滿血的HDMI 2.1接口，可連接高刷新率電視。其性能接近標壓的7735HS，功耗釋放稍高於同類產品，全功能Type C接口支援PD顯示一線通。散熱、靜音、穩定性俱佳，價格非常接近千元，是此價位段的首選。

第二款是售價1699元的傑末克K6，搭載了7840HS處理器。作者認為這款主機以極低的價格實現了降維打擊。在這個價位，其他廠商多銷售6800H或6900HX的主機，而K6直接提供了7840HS。它具備雙2.5G網卡，最高性能可達62W，相比其他8845HS表現不俗。作者認為唯一的缺點是未原生提供Oculink接口，無法實現接口大滿貫，但價格便宜，需要Oculink的遊戲玩家可花幾十元更換底座實現。

2000元到3000元旗艦級迷你主機推薦

作者測試了30多款780M/880M核顯迷你主機，此價位段的旗艦主機必須具備Oculink接口。作者首先推薦了幾個系列產品。

首先是天寶GEM12系列，外觀和接口基本一致，銷售GEM12 Plus和Max型號。其8845HS準系統僅售2069元，8745HS更低。具備接口大滿貫配置：雙2.5G、雙USB4、雙NVMe、Oculink接口。性能表現優秀，65W功耗釋放可達17000分。散熱、靜音出色，接口齊全，價格非常低。

接下來推薦的是傑末克K11和K8 Plus，接口配置和外觀相似，是傑末克迭代後的新產品，遠優於入門級K6。K8 Plus準系統售價2199元，K11使用更貴的8945HS CPU。兩者都具備接口大滿貫。性能方面，K11 8945HS遙遙領先，65W性能釋放良好，散熱穩定靜音，接口完美。

炫派魔方系列在一個外形接口上迭代了三款CPU。其7840HS準系統國補最低2000元，8745HS稍貴。同樣接口完美，性能釋放可達80W，處於作者測試過的780M核顯主機前列，雙USB4可實現PD輸入，是一款非常強悍的迷你主機。

最後推薦的旗艦主機系列是Minis Forum UM880系列。這款售價2200元的幾乎完美的迷你主機，是接口超級大滿貫的桶機。其性能長期位居作者性能排行榜前列，70W功耗釋放，接口完美，價格也不算貴。

以上四個不同廠家的780M系列迷你主機，準系統價格都在2000元出頭，是作者推薦的高品質旗艦級迷你主機系列。

此外，作者還額外推薦兩款單獨的780M核顯迷你主機。第一款是極夜T8，搭載8745HSCPU，價格約1900元。特色是採用了桌上型推下式散熱系統，性能釋放直接拉滿到85W，位居前列。同樣是超級大滿貫接口，適合需要強勁散熱的用戶考慮。另一款是作者之前一直推薦、幾乎沒有短板的FEVM FA880，升級雙2.5G網口後更名為FA880 Pro。價格稍貴，但性能絕對在所有780M核顯主機前列，70W功耗釋放，接口完美，待機功耗極低。

3000元以上獨立顯卡迷你主機推薦

針對預算在3000元以上、不設上限的單顯示輸出迷你主機，作者進行了推薦。最貴的測試型號是售價24999元的ROG NUC 2025，性能非常強勁（5080M顯卡），但價格很高。

作者最後推薦了Sky Barium GOD系列。這個系列售價在3000元以上，搭載AMD 6600le獨立顯卡。顯卡性能比80W的4060略高，約為RTX 4060的80%。性能釋放和接口都非常令人滿意，最重要的是價格僅在3000元出頭。其顯卡性能是HX370的兩倍。

全場景最值得購買的迷你主機：Mac Mini

作者認為，全場景下最值得購買的迷你主機是M4 Mac mini。國補後10G網口乞丐版僅需2899元。作者自己的購入價為5299元，直言有背刺感。M4 Mac mini具備無可匹敵的單核性能，多核性能接近HX370，圖形性能至少不差於HX370。這是一款風扇幾乎聽不到聲音、接近靜音的完美迷你主機，也是至今最便宜、最好的Mac mini。作者建議對電子產品好奇的朋友購買，它能打開新世界的大門。

結語

作者表示以上的推薦是基於目前的測試結果，並補充了一些關於下一代AMD旗艦CPU的額外說明。

item.content:encoded:
值得閱讀的理由

  • 本摘要涵蓋了2024年618期間，作者針對不同預算範圍（千元以下、1000-2000元、2000-3000元、3000元以上）測試並推薦的多款迷你主機。
  • 內容基於作者對近40款不同品牌迷你主機進行詳細測試後的經驗總結，提供了各價位段的性價比或性能首選。
  • 摘要不僅列出了推薦型號和大致價格，還強調了各款主機的關鍵特色，如處理器、核顯性能、接口配置（包含Oculink、USB4、2.5G網卡等）、散熱表現及功耗釋放，有助於讀者快速篩選符合需求的迷你主機。

摘要

影片開頭與分類介紹

作者首先向觀眾介紹，618年中購物節即將到來，他們將根據過去一年多測試近40款迷你主機的經驗，為大家推薦各價位段最值得購買的迷你主機。作者將市面上的迷你主機簡單粗暴地分為四類：千元以下的Intel低功耗N系列、1000元到2000元之間的中端高能效迷你主機（主要推薦AMD Ryzen）、2000元到3000元之間的旗艦級迷你主機（主要推薦AMD Ryzen），以及3000元以上的搭載獨立顯卡的迷你主機。

千元以下低功耗迷你主機推薦

針對預算在千元以下的用戶，作者主要推薦了基於Intel低功耗N系列處理器的迷你主機。作者展示了一份包含36款N系列低功耗主機的基本數據表格，方便觀眾參考。作者從中精選了四款進行推薦。

首先是售價569元的GMK Geo Moke G3 Plus，搭載Intel四核N150 CPU。這款準系統主機不僅價格便宜，用戶可自行加裝DDR4或更便宜的DDR5內存，其性能釋放接近15W，散熱和靜音表現優異。儘管是超迷你體積，但其對有線網絡接口的要求不應降低。

其次是售價859元的Sky Barium N1 Pro，搭載N150 CPU，內建12GB LPDDR5X 4800MHz內存，具備全功能Type C接口支援一線通。在如此小的體積下，還提供了雙2.5G網卡，散熱靜音表現出色，是目前最好的超迷你主機，雖然價格稍貴。

第三款是售價753元的零刻EQ14，搭載N150 CPU，是EQ13 N100的升級版，內建電源系統。

最後是售價995元的M9S N305，這是目前N305處理器中最便宜的型號，也是目前最強的N系列低功耗主機，CoreMark得分高達2000萬。

1000元到2000元中端高能效迷你主機推薦

在這個價位段，作者主要推薦了兩款表現突出的AMD Ryzen迷你主機。

第一款是近期測試的攀睿WO7，售價1159元。作者稱其為近兩年來最好的HTPC選擇。它不僅擁有千元級最強的680M核顯，還具備滿血的HDMI 2.1接口，可連接高刷新率電視。其性能接近標壓的7735HS，功耗釋放稍高於同類產品，全功能Type C接口支援PD顯示一線通。散熱、靜音、穩定性俱佳，價格非常接近千元，是此價位段的首選。

第二款是售價1699元的傑末克K6，搭載了7840HS處理器。作者認為這款主機以極低的價格實現了降維打擊。在這個價位，其他廠商多銷售6800H或6900HX的主機，而K6直接提供了7840HS。它具備雙2.5G網卡，最高性能可達62W，相比其他8845HS表現不俗。作者認為唯一的缺點是未原生提供Oculink接口，無法實現接口大滿貫，但價格便宜，需要Oculink的遊戲玩家可花幾十元更換底座實現。

2000元到3000元旗艦級迷你主機推薦

作者測試了30多款780M/880M核顯迷你主機，此價位段的旗艦主機必須具備Oculink接口。作者首先推薦了幾個系列產品。

首先是天寶GEM12系列，外觀和接口基本一致，銷售GEM12 Plus和Max型號。其8845HS準系統僅售2069元，8745HS更低。具備接口大滿貫配置：雙2.5G、雙USB4、雙NVMe、Oculink接口。性能表現優秀，65W功耗釋放可達17000分。散熱、靜音出色，接口齊全，價格非常低。

接下來推薦的是傑末克K11和K8 Plus，接口配置和外觀相似，是傑末克迭代後的新產品，遠優於入門級K6。K8 Plus準系統售價2199元，K11使用更貴的8945HS CPU。兩者都具備接口大滿貫。性能方面，K11 8945HS遙遙領先，65W性能釋放良好，散熱穩定靜音，接口完美。

炫派魔方系列在一個外形接口上迭代了三款CPU。其7840HS準系統國補最低2000元，8745HS稍貴。同樣接口完美，性能釋放可達80W，處於作者測試過的780M核顯主機前列，雙USB4可實現PD輸入，是一款非常強悍的迷你主機。

最後推薦的旗艦主機系列是Minis Forum UM880系列。這款售價2200元的幾乎完美的迷你主機，是接口超級大滿貫的桶機。其性能長期位居作者性能排行榜前列，70W功耗釋放，接口完美，價格也不算貴。

以上四個不同廠家的780M系列迷你主機，準系統價格都在2000元出頭，是作者推薦的高品質旗艦級迷你主機系列。

此外，作者還額外推薦兩款單獨的780M核顯迷你主機。第一款是極夜T8，搭載8745HSCPU，價格約1900元。特色是採用了桌上型推下式散熱系統，性能釋放直接拉滿到85W，位居前列。同樣是超級大滿貫接口，適合需要強勁散熱的用戶考慮。另一款是作者之前一直推薦、幾乎沒有短板的FEVM FA880，升級雙2.5G網口後更名為FA880 Pro。價格稍貴，但性能絕對在所有780M核顯主機前列，70W功耗釋放，接口完美，待機功耗極低。

3000元以上獨立顯卡迷你主機推薦

針對預算在3000元以上、不設上限的單顯示輸出迷你主機，作者進行了推薦。最貴的測試型號是售價24999元的ROG NUC 2025，性能非常強勁（5080M顯卡），但價格很高。

作者最後推薦了Sky Barium GOD系列。這個系列售價在3000元以上，搭載AMD 6600le獨立顯卡。顯卡性能比80W的4060略高，約為RTX 4060的80%。性能釋放和接口都非常令人滿意，最重要的是價格僅在3000元出頭。其顯卡性能是HX370的兩倍。

全場景最值得購買的迷你主機：Mac Mini

作者認為，全場景下最值得購買的迷你主機是M4 Mac mini。國補後10G網口乞丐版僅需2899元。作者自己的購入價為5299元，直言有背刺感。M4 Mac mini具備無可匹敵的單核性能，多核性能接近HX370，圖形性能至少不差於HX370。這是一款風扇幾乎聽不到聲音、接近靜音的完美迷你主機，也是至今最便宜、最好的Mac mini。作者建議對電子產品好奇的朋友購買，它能打開新世界的大門。

結語

作者表示以上的推薦是基於目前的測試結果，並補充了一些關於下一代AMD旗艦CPU的額外說明。

================================================

We simply and crudely divide. the mini hosts. on. the market into. the following four categories: Intel low-power N series small hosts within. 1000 yuan.
